# buildTraceView

> Assemble waterfall or flamegraph data from trace spans

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| traceId | string | yes |
| viewType | string | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[spans: call]
  A --> B[stats: call calculateTraceStats]
  B --> C[criticalPath: call findCriticalPath]
  C --> D[view: call]
  D --> E[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `TraceViewData`
